Home.tagline: I design scalable APIs, microservices and cloud-native systems. 6+ years shipping production code from startups to enterprise.

items.title: Backend & API Development
items.description: Scalable REST APIs, microservice architectures and distributed systems with .NET/C#. From greenfield design to production support, incident triage and performance tuning.

items.title: AWS Cloud Infrastructure
items.description: Cloud-native architectures on AWS: S3, Lambda, Cognito, CloudWatch. Infrastructure design, CI/CD pipelines, cost optimization and production monitoring.

items.title: AI Integration
items.description: AI-powered backend features: LLM integration, data vectorization, embedding search, chatbots and automation using LangChain, OpenAI and Amazon Bedrock.

items.title: Web & Desktop Development
items.description: Full-stack web apps with React/TypeScript and .NET backends. Enterprise desktop tools in WPF with focus on security, testability and maintainability.

about.title: About me
about.description: Backend engineer based in Japan with 6+ years of experience. I led the backend design and AWS infrastructure setup for a greenfield microservice product, taking it from concept to production. I focus on clean, testable code, robust data models, and reliable integrations between distributed services. I work closely with product, front-end and DevOps teams to translate requirements into reliable systems.

experience.title: My Experience
experience.description: Over 6 years building backend systems, APIs and cloud-native applications across startups, gaming, enterprise and public safety industries.

items.highlight: Led backend design & AWS infra from concept to production. Built SQL engine (+30-40% report speed), PDF/barcode automation (-50% processing time). Integrated AI/ML components.
Microservices with ASP.NET Core on AWS (EC2, S3, Lambda). Created technical docs that improved onboarding speed. Performance tuning for critical services.
Core features for a penetration testing platform. Full-stack ASP.NET + Angular. Architectural discussions on scalability and security.
Scalable backend for multiplayer gaming (thousands of concurrent players). RESTful APIs with MongoDB, Redis, AWS S3. Admin dashboards for operations.
Mission-critical app for emergency services across 40+ U.S. counties. Data encryption, 3000+ test cases stabilization. L2/L3 production support.
50+ custom BI reports for automotive clients. Optimized SQL queries (+30-40% performance). Technical docs and developer training that reduced onboarding time.

education.title: My Education
education.description: Computer Science foundation across three universities in Ukraine, Poland and China, with focus on software engineering, AI and data analytics.

skills.title: My skills
skills.description: Tech stack I use for backend, data, cloud, frontend, desktop, testing and AI.

items.title: Cocktail GSAP Website
items.description: Animated landing page for a fictional cocktail brand, built with React, TypeScript and GSAP to showcase smooth scroll-based animations and modern UI.

items.title: Computer Service Front
items.description: Simple marketing website for a computer repair service, focused on clean layout, clear service sections and responsive design.

items.title: Premium Cars
items.description: Landing page concept for a premium car brand, built with Angular and vanilla JS to practice component-based UI and basic routing.

items.title: Service Monitoring
items.description: A desktop application for monitoring service status, built with WPF and .NET to manage company services and their statuses.
